title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
